channel.title: Hive Investing Weekly
channel.description: Weekly market intelligence from Hive — what signals changed, what Hive's paper portfolio did, and what to watch next. Educational only, not financial advice.
channel.itunes:title: Hive Investing Weekly
channel.itunes:author: Hive Investing
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly market intelligence from Hive — what signals changed, what Hive's paper portfolio did, and what to watch next. Educational only, not financial advice.

item.title: Hive Midweek Brief — June 03, 2026
item.description:
# Hive Investing Midweek Briefing: June 03, 2026
## Executive Summary
The Hive ecosystem operates as a multi-tiered research platform designed to translate dense market data into a clear, dashboard-style narrative. As of the midweek brief on June 03, 2026, the market is characterized by a "cost-of-money" story where high interest rates (Fed Funds at 3.64%) and persistent inflation (CPI at 3.95% YoY) necessitate high earnings quality and sector rotation.
Current technical signals show a stron
Full weekly breakdown at hiveinvestai.substack.com — educational only, not financial advice.
item.itunes:title: Hive Midweek Brief — June 03, 2026
item.itunes:summary:
# Hive Investing Midweek Briefing: June 03, 2026
## Executive Summary
The Hive ecosystem operates as a multi-tiered research platform designed to translate dense market data into a clear, dashboard-style narrative. As of the midweek brief on June 03, 2026, the market is characterized by a "cost-of-money" story where high interest rates (Fed Funds at 3.64%) and persistent inflation (CPI at 3.95% YoY) necessitate high earnings quality and sector rotation.
Current technical signals show a stron
Full weekly breakdown at hiveinvestai.substack.com — educational only, not financial advice.

item.title: Hive Investing Weekly — May 29, 2026
item.description: Hive's weekly paper-trading research briefing for the week of May 29, 2026. Fresh weekly review covering regime signals, the signal chain, what Hive's paper portfolio did and avoided, and what to watch next. Educational only, not financial advice.
item.itunes:title: Hive Investing Weekly — May 29, 2026
item.itunes:summary: Hive's weekly paper-trading research briefing for the week of May 29, 2026. Fresh weekly review covering regime signals, the signal chain, what Hive's paper portfolio did and avoided, and what to watch next. Educational only, not financial advice.

item.title: Hive Investing Weekly — May 26, 2026
item.description: Hive's weekly paper-trading research briefing for the week of May 26, 2026. Conversational deep-dive into the week's macro signals, sector rotation, and what the simulated portfolio did. Educational only, not financial advice.
item.itunes:title: Hive Investing Weekly — May 26, 2026
item.itunes:summary: Hive's weekly paper-trading research briefing for the week of May 26, 2026. Conversational deep-dive into the week's macro signals, sector rotation, and what the simulated portfolio did. Educational only, not financial advice.
